name: The White House
subject: More than a paper diploma
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=150c641bd005963265a39e478854a7a8a4636558c42837976734b0089de0208378c66c8693002120f3200a69d3e2fcef323b53e48007cfbe

More than a paper diploma

“There are a great many reasons to support education choice,” then-Cato analyst Jason Bedrick wrote in 2016. “One reason is simply this: it works.”

This week is National School Choice Week, made official by President Donald J. Trump in a proclamation issued Monday. Just three decades ago, charter schools didn’t exist. Today, more than 3 million students are enrolled in such programs.

Two principles guide the Administration’s vision for school choice: opportunity and results. “Communities that provide academic options — traditional public, public charter, private, magnet, parochial, virtual, and homeschooling — empower parents and guardians to select the best educational fit for their children,” the President wrote.

In aggregate, those opportunities turn into a global competitive edge for America.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=150c641bd0059632587e822c3ba4a4e985a6b9020b50793a657b32f58223cfae0178260a8fd627f070df87cb78e5695520a6a55e71a428ab
Read more: “Our students deserve more than just a paper diploma.”

Vice President Pence returns to Washington

Vice President Mike Pence returned from a four-day trip to the Middle East last night, during which he met with President Abdel Fattah Al Sisi of Egypt, His Majesty King Abdullah II of Jordan, and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and President Reuven Rivlin of Israel.

Here are a few highlights of the Vice President’s trip, in his own words:

- “I can’t help but marvel at the strength of the relationship that President Trump and [Egyptian] President Al Sisi have forged, after years where our two countries were drifting apart.”
- To U.S. troops of the 332nd Air Expeditionary Wing: “You’ve answered the call to confront, and defeat, the embodiment of evil in our time — the barbarians known as ISIS.”
- To the Knesset in Israel: “In the weeks ahead, our administration will advance its plan to open the United States Embassy in Jerusalem, and that United States Embassy will open before the end of next year.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=150c641bd005963207fd2afbd3636d9196f3eccbeb48772fb55bbb6a3a014a7e5524ed37b04bda88160b4ad4d204abe0c4cd8edf8b690ba7
Read Vice President Pence’s full remarks to Israel’s national legislature.

President Trump’s op-ed: ‘A year of real change’

Congressional Democrats greeted President Trump’s first-year anniversary in office with a shutdown of the federal government. Despite their attempt to grab headlines, President Trump is confident his Administration’s record to date speaks for itself.

One excerpt from the piece: “Estimates predict the U.S. economy grew at an annualized rate of more than 3 percent in the fourth quarter of last year – just like it did in the two quarters before that. The economy has created more than two million new jobs, and the unemployment rate has fallen to its lowest rate in 17 years: 4.1 percent.”

The President closes with a nod to the “forgotten man” theme of his campaign: “After one year, I am proud to report to the American people that we truly are making America great again – for all Americans!”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=150c641bd00596323f5e947930ab1bab5f7ad87dcb538bf0e915adffb76ddb9f4c3851ca000d89268ea98005a436591bed5a44f3fef66d63
Read the President’s op-ed here.

Photo of the Day

Vice President Mike Pence praying at the Western Wall | January 23, 2018 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will hold a credentialing ceremony for newly appointed Ambassadors to Washington, D.C. Later the President will have lunch with Vice President Pence.

In the afternoon, the President will participate in a working session with mayors.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=150c641bd0059632d0243b5830c6105a2fafcf78d1b34fc68b5445f1a60119d30a7b628267a1f5d44707a1d0f1dc9e6c5efe9b822b180aa5
Watch Live at 3:00 p.m. ET.

This evening, the President will depart for Joint Base Andrews, in route to Zurich, Switzerland, to attend the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting.

name: DNC Headquarters
subject: Pennsylvania just changed the game for 2018, Derek
body:
The Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled in favor of redrawing gerrymandered districts.
---
This week there was an important court ruling in Pennsylvania that gives us an even better chance of taking back the House this year, Derek.

The Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled that Republicans unconstitutionally gerrymandered the state's congressional map -- a blow to Republican attempts to rig the system for their own candidates, and a victory for Democratic efforts to fight back.

Now under court order, Pennsylvania districts will be drawn more fairly -- putting more seats in play this November. Plus, Democrat Austin Davis won yesterday's special election in Pennsylvania's 35th state House district by a 48-point margin. That's 23 points more than the Democrats' margin of victory in 2016!

With 24 seats to flip to take back the House this year, _every single seat will make a difference._ Let's keep it up.

**Chip in $10 right now if you're ready to take back the House in 2018. We can do it -- but only with your support.**

[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c82d/3939814948/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c82b/3939814948/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c828/3939814948/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c829/3939814948/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c836/3939814948/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")
Regaining control of the House means all of us have to come together and start organizing now. Not in a few months or a few weeks -- now is the time to make a difference in this election.

The court ruling in Pennsylvania gives Democrats a serious chance at flipping several districts across the state. Now it's up to us to put in the work to make those victories possible.

**[Contribute $10 today and together we'll organize nationwide to help Democrats take back the House in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c837/3939814948/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+Contribute+10+today+and+together+well+or&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")**

When we organize, we win. It's that simple, Derek.

Thanks for being a part of this,

The Democrats

P.S. -- You know how we can avoid these gerrymandering messes in the first place? Electing more Democrats to state legislatures to stop Republicans from drawing maps that unfairly benefit the GOP. That's what we're doing this year -- electing Democrats up and down the ballot. **[Chip in $10 to be a part of it.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405223e6/4067b0a/4b107812b/7e51c834/3939814948/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa_court_ruling?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+Chip+in+10+to+be+a+part+of+it&utm_campaign=em_20180124_dnc_s2&source=em_20180124_dnc_s2&refcode=em_20180124_dnc_s2")**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Add your name for a Democratic majority:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek --

Over the past few months, it has become increasingly clear that much of our current government just isn't working for the people of this country. It's gridlocked, it's dysfunctional, and President Trump and Republican leaders spent last year focused on taking away health care and giving tax cuts to those at the very top, instead of solving the challenges facing our country. So many Virginians and Americans are feeling dismayed by it -- I know I sure am some days.

**But we can move forward. How?[By taking back a Democratic majority this November.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=60dmI6w5g47ln33ljAb1F0i2FRl62Hn6)** On November 6th, 34 of our total 100 Senate seats will be up. Right now, Republicans hold a slim 51-seat majority. That means if we hold our seats and pick up just two seats, we can get the results our country needs. We can expand, not repeal, health care. We can permanently protect Dreamers. We can fix the disastrous tax bill that benefits those at the top and leaves the middle class holding the bag.

[**Add your name if you're ready for a Democratic majority in the Senate.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XmK3QY7HcUueojSvIR6HwEi2FRl62Hn6)

**This is the reality we're trying to change: We have a president sitting in the Oval Office pushing an extreme agenda and far too many Republicans in Congress, including the Senate and House leaders, who are unwilling to stand up to him.** We need a real emergency brake on this runaway train -- and by taking back a Democratic majority, Congress has the capacity to be that check on Donald Trump and his most outrageous, dangerous ideas.

2018 is our chance. I know we can do it: Look at Democrats' sweep in Virginia this past fall (and the fifteen House of Delegates seats we flipped!). Look at my friend Doug Jones, the first Democrat to be elected to the Senate from Alabama in 25 years. Look at the incredible anniversary of the Women's March just this past weekend. Look at the activism and organizing we're seeing across the country every single day.

[**Sign my petition right now to say you're going to fight for a Democratic majority in the Senate on November 6th, 2018.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VX6Jj4WHEAH9qsCWRwZrjEi2FRl62Hn6)

Thanks for all you do. I'll be right beside you in this fight.

Tim Kaine

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tIPZJP77bqW1t5V0K3T4p0i2FRl62Hn6)

It may be a new year, but we still have the same goal: **getting Republicans elected!**
Gov. Sununu is consistently one of the most popular governors in the country and we are looking forward to many more years under his successful leadership.
_**But the upcoming election isn't going to be won so easily.**_
When you activate or renew your 2018 membership today, you're giving the NHGOP and the Governor an early boost to help us build out our 2018 victory operation. We have a ton of work to do and your immediate membership contribution of $15, $25, $35, or even $55 right now jump starts our path to victory. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Democratic women of the Senate need you in their corner, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Thanks to the power of women and our ability to organize a movement, the resistance showed up on day 1 of the Trump administration. And we need to continue this movement -- are you in?
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180124-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Friend, a year ago, the world changed.

I'm not talking about Donald Trump's inauguration. I'm talking about the day after -- the day five million of us took to the streets around the world. The Women's March jump-started a movement -- and called forth an unstoppable army for change.

We stood shoulder to shoulder and made it clear: We are here, we will not be silent, we will not roll over and play dead, and we will fight for what we believe in.

The crowds in Boston were like a giant family reunion. Women in pink hats. Men pushing strollers. Kids laughing and running. Babies and great-grannies. Hugs and laughter. And an ocean of signs -- colorful, clever, creative.

When I looked out over that sea of 175,000 dedicated, passionate people spilling out of Boston Common, and when I saw the photos of the rallies happening all over the country and around the world, I felt hopeful. Because I knew that, together, we would make sure this day went down in history.

We knew this would be a hard fight. We knew that there would be dark moments. But we knew we didn't have to do this alone. Time and time again I've seen the Democratic women of the Senate bring the issues that matter to the forefront. We've spent every day fighting for what's right -- and so many of you have been right there alongside us.

But, friend, if we want to keep all our Democratic women Senators (including myself!) fighting on these issues, we need to make sure they're re-elected this year. That's why I'm asking you: **[Can I count on you to keep fighting alongside our Democratic women Senators? Simply chip in $1 to the Women's Senate Network to help our Senators get the job done.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180124-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Last year, we were so loud that nobody -- not even Donald Trump -- could ignore us. We sent a powerful message that we won't back down, and we won't be quiet.

**It 's time to be loud again, friend, and make sure everyone knows we're still out here, we're still fired up, and we will persist. Chip in to the Women's Senate Network today >>**

[**http://www.dscc.org/keep-persisting-together**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180124-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for being a part of this. We're in this together,

Elizabeth

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: We were 1 vote away from setting back Republicans' plans
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ba2/24c69fd9/12e4a93e8/189581de/46161084/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact&source=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact")
---

Peter,

Republicans are dangerously close to being able to call a constitutional convention _without a single Democratic vote._

Currently, they control 32 out of the 34 state legislatures needed to call a convention where they'd be able to rewrite the Constitution.

But in November, we almost set them back by one legislature, when we came within a single vote of breaking Republicans' control of the Virginia House of Delegates. Seriously -- we were only short ONE vote in a recount for ONE seat that would've tied representation in the House.

If we got that close in Virginia, where Democrats were previously 32 seats down, flipping chambers in other states is a very real possibility this year.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who can flip state legislatures and stop Republicans from calling a constitutional convention.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ba2/24c69fd9/12e4a93e8/189581df/46161084/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180124_email_ConstitutionalConvention598seats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact&source=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact")**

After our recent victories in Virginia, Georgia, Washington State, and Wisconsin, we know the opportunity to replace dozens, maybe hundreds, of Republicans in November is real.

That's why we're targeting 598 state legislative seats this year alone, the biggest state and local effort in our history.

If we can recruit pro-choice Democratic women to run for these seats, we could squash Republicans' chances of calling a constitutional convention and put the possibility out of reach for years.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to state legislatures and stop any chance Republicans have at rewriting the Constitution:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Women-Flip-Legislatures](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6ba2/24c69fd9/12e4a93e8/189581d8/46161084/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180124_email_ConstitutionalConvention598seats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpWomenFlipLeg&utm_campaign=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact&source=WQEFEM42N_digital_email_20180124_ConCon598_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Stamping money out of politics
body:
This Sunday, Our Revolution joined almost a dozen national organizations
#
Friends,
This Sunday, Our Revolution joined almost a dozen national organizations to hold a day of action marking the eighth anniversary of _Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission_. Along with Ben Cohen of Ben & Jerry's and Stamp Stampede, over 18,000 people pledged to stamp 1.9 million bills with messages like "NOT TO BE USED FOR BUYING POLITICIANS," and more than twice as many tuned in to the livestream. This viral marketing campaign raises awareness about money in politics, but we need to do more than that. We need your support.
[**Please chip in $5 to Our Revolution and help us build the grassroots movement to take on the special interests and Super PACs. We need to tell people the truth about what is going on in our democracy and fight back against any attempts to divide us or drag us backward.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad48/bed43eb/32bfa0f6/75fec560/654399510/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corrupt-campaign-finance?refcode=em180124-full&noskip=true")
For eight years, Citizens United has allowed unlimited corporate spending in our elections. The Supreme Court's decision that corporations are people and money is speech has allowed billionaires and special interests to buy politicians and form Super PACs to spread ugly, misleading attacks. We have to overturn this rule. Each day that Citizens United remains in effect moves us further from democracy and closer to oligarchy.
The greed of the billionaire class knows no bounds, but we can fight back. While billionaires spread misinformation with TV ads, Our Revolution volunteers are organizing, holding meetings, phone banks, canvasses, and other actions to connect people with their neighbors and talk about the real issues we face in our communities. You can help these efforts.
[**Make a $5 contribution and help us get organized in our communities. name: Jason Yates
subject: School choice changes lives
body:
| | You can help be an advocate for those without choice
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fschool-choice-saved-my-life%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180124com01&n=1)
| Peter, This week is National School Choice Week! On Monday, January 22nd, President Trump signed the National School Choice Week Proclamation. _“By giving parents more control over their children’s education, we are making strides toward a future of unprecedented educational attainment and freedom of choice. Under the leadership of Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos, we will continue to advance school choice so that every child in America has access to the tools best suited to enabling them to achieve the American Dream.”_ _Excerpt from President Trump’s Proclamation._[_read more._](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.whitehouse.gov%2Fpresidential-actions%2Fpresident-donald-j-trump-proclaims-january-21-january-27-2018-national-school-choice-week%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180124com01&n=2) I applaud this move by the President because I believe school choice is rooted in an important biblical principle. God entrusts children to parents, and parents are primarily responsible for a child’s education (Proverbs 22:6). So what does this mean? I believe it means that parents in the United States should be empowered to pursue the best possible education for their children that supports the values of their faith...regardless of their zip code or economic status. However, in most states in America, parents are stripped of their ability to choose the best education option for their child. If a family can’t afford a private school or to homeschool, their only option is the public school in their zip code. If they wish to send their child to a better public school, their only option is to buy a nicer house in a better district. This simply isn’t possible for many families across America. Our current education system discriminates against the impoverished. It’s time we have equal education opportunity in America for all families regardless of their zip code. As Christians, we should champion the cause of school choice not only for our own children and grandchildren but also for the less fortunate families in our nation. [Learn how school choice saved Denisha’s life in Jacksonville, Florida.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fschool-choice-saved-my-life%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180124com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180124com01&n=4)
